name: Beatwidow
description: A dancing spider? This Invizimal world is full of surprises! I present Beatwidow, the queen of the disco, who can break dance or as a robot... Whatever you want!! This creature is such a good dancer that she has a disco ball in her stomach. By the way, watch that ball... maybe you can use it in more... dangerous ways!

name: Firecracker
description: Firecrackers were mentioned in ancient papyrus seven hundred years ago. These mighty creatures of fire and ash dwell in the depths of volcanoes like Mount Vesuvius. Dawson and Kenichi discovered them in their first adventure, and since then Dawson always carries one of these around, as his personal pet.

name: Flameclaw
description: Deep in the Egyptian desert, in a climate so hot it set his body on fire, lives the Flameclaw. A strange scorpion-like creature, Flameclaw combines poison with fire in a fatal cocktail, spiced with an arrogant personality. This creature is really king of the desert, and is notorious for behaving as such.

name: Fossilizaur
description: Some creatures can change the colour of their skin at will: Chameleons, some lizards and the Fossilzaur, the Invizimal that lives in caves. Changing your colour has become a survival strategy: you can disguise yourself, wait patiently and catch your prey by surprise. But in the dark caves do not happen many things, so sometimes the Fossilzaur has to wait. And wait.

name: Griffonator
description: The Griffonators are stalkers reptiles roaming the banks of rivers in India. Fast and loud, they have the ability to fly short distances using their little wings so they can fly on their prey, and silently attack from above with a lethal blow.

name: Minotaur
description: Minotaur used to be free to roam the earth... But they are so dangerous; a king in ancient Greece had to build a labyrinth to hold them! Now you helped one of them escape, this angry, fierce Invizimal owes you a debt of gratitude...

name: Minotaur

name: Porcupain
description: Deep in Hawaii Volcanoes live Porcupain, a race of strong warriors who just want to eat, sleep and fight. The Porcupains have the ability to stretch his body, which used to surprise their enemies. But every warrior has a weakness and Porcupains often have nightmares. Make sure that your Porcupain sleep well and will be a loyal companion!

name: Shizoku
description: In feudal Japan, everyone could become a hero. Take Shizoku, for example. Once a happy pig grazing the farm lands, he's now become a full-blown warrior in armor. Imagine the face of the farmers when they saw him coming out of the stables, dressed ears to hoof in full samurai regalia!

name: Stingwing
description: Stingwing was the first Invizimal Kenichi ever captured. A playful insect, don't let her looks deceive you: Stingwing can generate powerful electrical shocks that make her as attractive... as she is dangerous. Experienced players never underestimate them in combat.

name: Toxitoad
description: Some Invizimals are pretty... And some are like Toxitoad! Nobody knows exactly how this toad ended up in a toxic dump, but everyone can see the effects on him: Acid attacks, toxic fumes and a personality to match is all you can expect from this true madman. Oh, and he loves Heavy Metal music. Can it get any worse?

name: Usako
description: Years ago there was a geisha named Usako, who played a decisive role in ancient Japan. This mysterious dancer was not an appreciated entertainment for the rich and noble: she was also one of the best spies and her beauty was comparable to her ability to infiltrate.

name: Usako
description: Years ago there was a geisha named Usako, who played a decisive role in ancient Japan. This mysterious dancer was not an appreciated entertainment for the rich and noble: she was also one of the best spies and her beauty was comparable to her ability to infiltrate.

name: Xue Hu
description: Contemplate Xue Hu, the powerful white tiger of the sky, fourth and most powerful protector of the tomb of the dragon emperor. Unknown by the majority, feared by all, only the warriors who defeat the first three guardians will face him in battle and will see him spread his wings in flames.

name: Xue Hu

Unknown by the majority, feared by all, only the warriors who defeat the first three guardians will face him in battle and will see him spread his wings in flames.

name: Xue Hu
description: Contemplate Xue Hu, the powerful white tiger of the sky, fourth and most powerful protector of the tomb of the dragon emperor. Unknown by the majority, feared by all, only the warriors who defeat the first three guardians will face him in battle and will see him spread his wings in flames.

name: Flamigerodon
description: The Flamigerodon is a very intelligent Invizimal. It can create flames with its bare hands! It is so proud not to use it as a weapon. Unfortunately it can not control its power very well. You know what they say: If you play with fire, you could burn yourself!

name: Pahoehoe
description: Pahoehoe is a beast that lives in volcanoes all over the world. Whenever she is furious, she becomes a lava that floods everything the surrounding area, burning it to the ground. Only those who enter her palace of fire shall see her face.

name: T-Rex
description: So the Invizimals and the dinosaurs are connected in some way? Well, look at this powerful T-Rex if you need proof. The T-Rex were extinguished eons ago, but somehow they are alive and kicking... in the wave, in the Invizimal world.

name: Dark Flameclaw
description: This is a strange creature... Looks like a Flameclaw, but it's... Evil. Aggressive. Dark. The Dark Flameclaw we shall call him. What a really mean guy. Loves to show-off, like all Flameclaws do, but his attacks have been boosted and he seems to be angrier. Use him with care. We need to learn more about these new kind of Invizimals.

name: Dark Sandflame
description: What do you get if you apply the ritual of transformation to a cute little Sandflame? Well, you get a cute little Dark Sandflame! Unsurprised? What if we told you Dark Sandflames have massive stamina, and not only that, but massive stamina recovery? Yes, you got it: Dark Sandflames keep fighting. And fighting. And fighting.

name: Dark Xue Hu
description: In the Chinese province of Fujian have been aware of the existence of blue tigers for centuries. From there comes the Dark Xue Hu: A Xue Hu was lying next to a lake on a full moon night, and by some kind of spell, his skin turned pale blue. It is an exceptional creature, which can only be obtained in the transformation ritual, so when you meet one, treat it well!

name: Fire Dragon
description: Fire breathing dragons have been feared in Europe since medieval ages. The most common type of dragon, the Invizimal Fire Dragon obviously does breathe fire, so don't stand in his way!!! But he also has some hidden tricks, such as the ability to summon hell, generating an electrical charge that sets everything around him in flames.

name: Gold Dragon
description: A four-winged dragon? And made of gold? Invizimals have some strange ways of doing things, and the Gold Dragon is no different. It is said that it was born from the jewel of the crown of an ancient pharaoh, shining more than the sun with its wings. But whatever your story, you're really going to shine in any competition when you have this creature!
